summary: Comprehensive testing of AATL (Autonomous Agent Threat Layer), AATR (Autonomous AI Threat Registry), and Swarm features. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all pages and tabs working correctly.

issues: No sidebar navigation link to /ai-threats page - users must navigate directly via URL

passed_tests: GET /api/ai-threats/intelligence/dashboard - Returns AATL and AATR dashboard data
GET /api/ai-threats/aatl/assessments - Returns AATL assessments with threat scores
GET /api/ai-threats/aatl/assessments?min_threat=30 - Filter by minimum threat score
POST /api/swarm/cli/event - Single CLI event ingestion with AATL processing
POST /api/swarm/cli/event - Multiple commands trigger AATL assessment
GET /api/swarm/devices - Returns discovered devices with stats
AATL detects machine-like behavior patterns (fast typing, consistent timing)
AATL recommends appropriate strategies (observe, slow, poison, deceive, contain, eradicate)

features: Recent Sessions with ML scores and intent badges
Scan Network and Deploy All buttons
Device list with IP, risk score, status
AATL Overview tab with Actor Type Distribution and Attack Lifecycle Stages
AI-Specific Response Strategies (Observe, Slow, Poison, Deceive, Contain, Eradicate)
Threat Assessments tab with detailed session analysis
AATR Registry tab with 6 threat entries

threat_scoring: Threat levels: low, medium, high, critical
response_strategies: eradicate - Full removal and system recovery

action_items: Consider adding sidebar navigation link to AI Threat Intelligence page (/ai-threats)
critical_code_review_comments: AATL engine correctly analyzes CLI command patterns for machine-like behavior
AATR registry provides comprehensive defensive intelligence catalog
CLI event ingestion properly processes through AATL and returns assessments
Network discovery service running and discovering devices
All response strategies properly mapped to threat levels
seed_data_creation: CLI commands and sessions created during testing for AATL analysis
context_for_next_testing_agent: All AATL/AATR/Swarm features working correctly. Backend APIs return proper data. Frontend pages load and display data correctly. AI Threat Intelligence page accessible at /ai-threats but no sidebar link. CLI event ingestion triggers AATL analysis and returns threat assessments. AATR registry contains 6 threat entries with comprehensive defensive intelligence.
